# xxHash (vendored)

Header-only [xxHash](https://github.com/Cyan4973/xxHash) **0.8.3**, used by the
real-time linear-hash index (`LinearHashIndex`) via `XXH_INLINE_ALL` and
`XXH3_64bits`.

| File | Role |
| --- | --- |
| `xxhash.h` | Upstream single-header amalgamation (BSD-2-Clause notice in file) |
| `LICENSE` | Upstream BSD-2-Clause license text |

Taken verbatim from the `v0.8.3` tag. No local modifications.
